examples: Some leading lights, believed to include Riad Turk, have argued against meeting Mr Assad’s emissaries, presuming that they are bound to be insincere.
Riad Turk, a Sunni businessman who spent 25 years in jail, is a widely respected supporter.
GARCIA-NAVARRO: Riad Mesti(ph) tapes up an advertisement he's written touting his services as a tour guide.
